# inkscape-mcp
> Professional vector graphics and SVG operations for AI agents through the Model Context Protocol. Provides AI agents with comprehensive vector graphics capabilities including AI-powered SVG generation...

This project includes automated llms.txt generation for AI accessibility.

## Docs
- [Readme](README.md): Professional vector graphics and SVG operations for AI agents through the Model Context Protocol.
- [Prd](PRD.md): **Version:** 1.3.0
- [Features](docs\FEATURES.md): Transform natural language into professional SVG vector graphics using advanced AI models.
- [Changelog](CHANGELOG.md): All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file.
- [Troubleshooting](docs\TROUBLESHOOTING.md): **Error:** `Inkscape executable not found`
- [Usage](docs\USAGE.md): Generate SVG graphics from natural language descriptions:

- [Package](web_sota\package.json): Node.js project configuration and dependencies
